name: me7_lookup_1d_word
comment: 1-D word table interp (offset r12; page r13; input r14 -> r4)

name: ldr_solenoid_output
comment: LDR wastegate solenoid output + overboost RPM trip

name: torque_kfmirl_revlimit
comment: KFMIRL torque->load (rlsol) AND the NMAX rev limiter (limiters.md)

name: rl_producer
comment: assembles measured load rl -> loc_F47A / byte_F473(rl>>5) / loc_F478 (load-rl.md)

name: maf_linearize
comment: HFM/MAF voltage -> air-mass signal loc_F45E (linear gain/offset)

name: nmot_compute
comment: compute engine speed word_F410 (nmot) from crank period

name: charge_model_estimator
comment: manifold-pressure -> charge model: pressure-ratio cascade -> word_302C40/302C54 (charge.md)

name: vvt_intake_ctrl
comment: VVT intake cam-phase PI controller -> duty byte_31D2CF (cam-timing.md)

name: vvt_exhaust_ctrl
comment: VVT exhaust cam-phase PI controller -> duty byte_31D2E5 (cam-timing.md)

name: vvt_intake_setpoint
comment: VVT intake cam-angle setpoint map KFWNWSAPE @0x1DB32

name: vvt_exhaust_setpoint
comment: VVT exhaust cam-angle setpoint map KFWNWSAPA @0x1E338

name: cam_edge_latch
comment: cam-sensor edge latch -> measured cam angle (nwist)

name: lambda_adaptation_lra
comment: long-term lambda adaptation (LRA): cascaded PT1 -> persistent trim word_30A18A (fueling.md 7)

name: lra_boot_restore
comment: LRA power-on restore of persisted lambda trim

name: evap_purge_ctrl
comment: EVAP canister-purge (TEV) controller: duty byte_30A0C2 + fuel-portion FSRFKAS (fueling.md 8)

name: cranking_inj_qty
comment: cranking injection quantity: start map 0x21282 keyed rpm x load (fueling.md 10)

name: afterstart_enrich
comment: after-start enrichment decay vs timer word_302D70 -> word_302812 (fueling.md 10)

name: start_state_machine
comment: start/after-start state machine: word_FD7A.14/.15 + after-start timer word_302D70

name: rk_producer
comment: relative fuel mass rk: folds start/after-start enrich -> word_302968

name: idle_reserve_shape
comment: idle reserve shaping vs rpm -> word_305182 (idle-governor.md)

name: thermal_estimator
comment: multi-channel estimator: 6 PT1 over rpm x load maps; thermal role inferred (warmup-idle-thermal.md 2)

name: egt_sensor_model
comment: exhaust-gas-temp sensor model + diag (EXA* cals) -> byte_304974 (warmup-idle-thermal.md 4)

name: egt_overtemp_consumer
comment: EGT over-temp: byte_304974 vs EFFMFA2 -> overheat flag byte_3007DD

name: vmax_speed_limiter
comment: vehicle-speed limiter (VMAX): PI torque governor -> word_304F3C (limiters.md)

name: diag_o2_sensor_monitor
comment: DIAGNOSTIC: O2/lambda-sensor OBD monitor (INHASE02/04/05); no control

name: diag_brake_booster
comment: DIAGNOSTIC: brake-booster (BKV) vacuum diag -> byte_304753 fault

name: diag_brake_booster_front
comment: DIAGNOSTIC: brake-booster diag front-end / state machine

name: diag_rationality_monitor
comment: DIAGNOSTIC: sensor/model rationality monitor -> FD34/FD36 DTC
